description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The exterior features a mix of white, gray, and reddish-brown wall panels, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. The house includes a spacious balcony and a rooftop terrace, as well as a paved driveway leading to a garage. Surrounding the house are several trees and a car parked on the driveway, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area and a prominent overhang. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and reddish-brown exterior panels. Features include a balcony, rooftop terrace, garage, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dark side of the house, rooftop terrace, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlighting the reddish-brown facade, main entryway, balcony, and palm tree.
description_view_2: Side view with visible garage, driveway, car, and a clear look at the house's layered structure.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, paved driveway, and a mix of trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, large glass door, and a prominent overhang
